title: Fresh Flowers and Plants VR
description: Resource Pack adding 3D plant and flowers models tailored for Vivecraft!
body:
# Fresh Flowers and Plants for Vivecraft

**A port of [Fresh Flowers and Plants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flowers-and-plants) by Cyber, made visually compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft).**

---

## 🪴 About the Original Pack

> *This resource pack makes all flowers, corals, saplings, and plant items appear as 3D models only when held in your hand. Everywhere else—inventory, hotbar, chests, and other GUI screens—they remain as the default 2D sprites.*

> *It’s a lightweight visual upgrade that adds depth and realism while keeping the classic inventory look unchanged.*

> *Also includes an alternate version where the items are 3D in the GUI as well, for players who prefer full visual consistency.*

---

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22052c2358da04da3c0e8f491bf9bd121cc8fde8_0.webp)

---

## Suggested Mods
[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to change resourcepack options.
[Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) to allow item transparency for certain items.

---

## Required Mods on 1.21.5 and Below
To play on 1.21.4, 1.21.1, and 1.20.1, [Modefite](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport) and [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) (if on Forge/NeoForge) are required.

---

## 🥽 Vivecraft Compatibility

This version ensures all custom plant and flower models are rendered correctly in **Vivecraft's VR environment**, maintaining full immersion.

⚠️ **Positions will be odd unless on Vivecraft 1.3.0+, please update if on an older version! Now supports any controller type!**

---
